Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit connection to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture practices is found in the course description.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content does not address health outcomes, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with relevant knowledge and skills for employment in global trade businesses (Target 4.4).
evidence: To enable students with knowledge of cross border digital trade
To prepare students who wish to enter into global trade businesses

Gender Equality.reason: There is no mention of gender-specific issues, empowerment of women, or addressing gender disparities in the course content.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content does not relate to water quality, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course does not discuss energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.
